title: No dependency manifest (requirements.txt / pyproject.toml)
evidence: No requirements.txt, pyproject.toml or setup.py in run_dir; data_loader.py:3 imports pandas and server.py:3 imports mcp.server.fastmcp, neither declared
suggestion: Add a requirements.txt pinning pandas and mcp so the server is reproducible

title: 30 ruff violations (code_quality=0.667)
evidence: ruff check .: 16 E501 (line too long), 6 F401 (unused imports e.g. query_engine.py:2 `import re`), 6 I001 (unsorted imports), 2 F541 (f-string without placeholders, server.py:127, server.py:154)
suggestion: Run `ruff check --fix` to clear the 14 auto-fixable issues and wrap long lines

title: Date-range match filtering not implemented (season only)
evidence: query_engine.py:29 find_matches exposes a `season` filter but no date-range param; parse_date in data_loader.py:18 is defined and unit-tested but never used by a query. R4 ('date range and/or season') is satisfied via season.
suggestion: Wire parse_date into a from/to date filter on find_matches to fully cover the date-range capability

title: BR-Football-Dataset loaded but not queryable
evidence: data_loader.py:69 extended_stats (10k matches w/ corners/shots) is loaded and tested, but all_matches (data_loader.py:106) concatenates only brasileirao, cup, libertadores, historical; find_matches/query engine never read extended_stats
suggestion: Either include extended_stats in all_matches or expose a tool over its richer per-match statistics
